title: Modularity with Oliver Drotbohm
summary: Oliver and I discuss modularity in Java with a focus on the Java module system
content:
Oliver and I discuss modularity in Java with a focus on the Java module system

Oliver is Senior Principal Software Engineer at Pivotal, Java Champion, and OpenSource enthusiast. He's an expert in all things Spring, data, DDD, REST, and software architecture. He's into drums and music and is the inventor of the @soundtrack annotation.
